function.name: add_model
function.description: Add a new model to a provider in the agent configuration. Creates the provider if it doesn't exist.

id.description: Model ID as the provider knows it, e.g. 'llama3.1:8b'

contextWindow.description: Maximum context window size in tokens

launch.description: Set _launch flag — whether to start the model on agent boot

api.description: API compatibility type (only used when creating a new provider), e.g. 'openai-completions'

apiKey.description: API key for the provider (only used when creating a new provider)

baseUrl.description: Base URL for the provider API (only used when creating a new provider)

function.name: remove_model
function.description: Remove a model from a provider. Removes the provider entirely if it has no remaining models.

function.name: list_models
function.description: List all configured models, optionally filtered by provider.

provider.description: Filter by provider name. Omit to list all providers.
